MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MONIQUE DOBBS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff California Casualty Indemnity Exchanges Action is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed order included with the moving papers. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/EPS)
